channel.title: US President on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in US President on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Total Desi ;)
item.description:
Comments

Comment by Bhagwant Sidhu on 2008-11-05 20:48:26 +0530

This is funny man! eh loki baaj ni aunde ena cheeza ton.

Comment by Paali on 2008-11-12 10:25:53 +0530

hahaha good one

Comment by puja on 2008-11-15 17:46:58 +0530

Just look at these people…. they are so passionate abt what is happening in the other person’s home.. wish they were really as cultured as they claim themselves to be 🙁

Comment by hssidhu on 2008-11-15 19:28:43 +0530

hahaha.. ethe canada ch loka ch enni khushi nai jinne india ch lok khush ne.. lol
